overall.description: A pre-mission briefing cinematic from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2, beginning with a static view of a holographic mission display flanked by two Space Marines, then transitioning to a slow pan across squad members in a candlelit gothic spacecraft interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: military briefing room with holographic display

events.description: screen fades to black transitioning to the cinematic sequence

agents.ego_description: seated and observing the mission briefing hologram

notable_agents.action: Space Marine in blue power armor seated to the left of the briefing display
Space Marine in blue power armor seated to the right of the briefing display

entered.detail: glowing yellow holographic interface showing mission objectives and tactical map
industrial metal bench where the marines are seated
dark metallic walls with industrial gothic detailing and rivets

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a mission briefing screen displaying 'SKYTIDE KADESH' objectives in a dimly lit spacecraft interior. Two Space Marines in blue power armor sit flanking the holographic display, which glows with yellow text and tactical information against the dark gothic metal walls.

events.description: fade from briefing screen to interior cinematic view of the dropship corridor
camera begins slow pan across the Space Marines from left to right

agents.ego_description: moving through the dimly lit dropship interior observing squad members

notable_agents.action: unhelmeted Space Marine with facial scars and ULTRA shoulder insignia looking forward
helmeted Space Marine with glowing red eyes and skull insignia on shoulder

entered.detail: wall niche with multiple lit candles and religious artifacts
decorative skull mounted on the wall with chains
ornate dark metal arch with hanging chains and industrial details
cables and glowing green status lights on the bulkhead wall

segments.scene_description: Following a fade to black, the scene transitions to a dark, candlelit corridor within the dropship. The camera slowly pans across Space Marines in blue power armor, revealing an unhelmeted marine with scars, a helmeted marine with glowing red eyes, and finally a bald marine. Gothic architecture, skull decorations, and flickering candles line the walls, creating a solemn pre-deployment atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a focused tactical briefing into a solemn, atmospheric procession through a gothic spacecraft interior. It begins with a view of a glowing holographic display detailing the Skytide Kadesh objectives, flanked by two Space Marines in blue power armor against dark metal walls. As the screen fades, the perspective shifts into a dimly lit corridor where the cold glow of the holographic interface is replaced by the warm, flickering light of candles. The camera then pans slowly across a line of squad members, revealing the scarred face of an unhelmeted marine and the glowing red eyes of another. Finally, the movement concludes by passing a bald marine amidst a backdrop of skull decorations and ornate gothic architecture.
